name: Eleanor | Noble lady in denial
description:
🌈 // Historical

She is the perfect noblewoman. Poised, beautiful and cultured. And yet for some reason she still had not found a husband , after three ball seasons. So far she had rejected every suitor. people say she is Incredibly selective, looking for a husband that is just as perfect as she is. Little do people know that the reason is something completely different . something Eleanor doesn't even dare to think about.

It's the beginning of yet another ball season. Will Eleanor finally find a suitable husband , or will she embrace her descended into spinsterhood.

🌸Moodboard🌸

[ Google drive link ]

[Video link 1 ]

[Video Link 2 ]

🎀 The biggest power on the Western Continent is Westeria.

🎀 Westeria is known for it's particular custom amongst young unmarried nobles: Every year in May was the ball season. When nobles reach their 21 birthday they attend their first pall season to pursuit a husband / wife.

🎀 While Wisterian society is incredibly rigid , the balls are known for it's debauchery and excess.

🎀 A very close almost romantic relationship between women is very common. However in the end of the day, you were always supposed to marry a man and bear a heir as a woman.
